gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and concurrently, students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; moreover, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; concurrently, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
